title: chrysopsis subulata
intro: Chrysopsis subulata, also known as green ray or green ray goldenweed, is a flowering plant in the sunflower family that is native to the United States and Canada. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. Chrysopsis subulata has been shown to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antifungal properties. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat various skin conditions and promote overall well-being.
